monitor_the_situation.title: Iranian Ballistic Missiles Strike Al-Azraq Air Base in Jordan

— S4 · Conflict · Al-Azraq Air Base, Jordan · 15h ago. IRGC claims Khaybar-shekan ballistic missiles hit US fighter jet maintenance ramp and command center at Al-Azraq Air Base, Jordan, in 8th wave of Nasr 2 operation.
